title: PC Building
content: Building custom PCs focused on performance, airflow, and reliability. I enjoy selecting parts, optimizing cooling setups, cable management, and benchmarking systems to test real-world performance. I also experiment with upgrades, overclocking, and troubleshooting hardware issues to get the most out of each build.

title: Servers & Linux
content: Running home servers and experimenting with Linux systems. This includes setting up self-hosted services, managing containers, learning networking fundamentals, and automating tasks. I also explore different distros and enjoy understanding how systems run at a deeper level beyond standard user interfaces.

title: Speed Cubing
content: Practicing speed cubing with a focus on improving algorithms, recognition, and finger tricks. I work on reducing solve times through repetition, learning efficient methods, and tracking averages. It’s a mix of pattern recognition, memory, and fast execution under pressure.

title: 3D Printing
content: Designing and printing functional parts, prototypes, and custom creations. I use 3D printing for practical engineering ideas as well as creative projects, focusing on design optimization, tolerances, and material behavior. It often connects with CAD work and real-world problem solving.

title: Karate
content: Training in karate with a focus on discipline, technique, and physical conditioning. I practice forms, sparring, and controlled movement while building consistency, reflexes, and mental focus. It also helps with overall fitness and mindset development.

title: FPV / Drones
content: Flying and building FPV drones, including tuning flight controllers, improving stability, and testing different frame and motor setups. I enjoy both the technical side of building and the creative side of flying cinematic or freestyle lines through environments.

title: Mechatronics / Engineering
content: Exploring embedded systems, sensors, electronics, and mechanical design. I work on small prototypes that combine software and hardware, learning how systems interact in real-world applications. This includes CAD modelling, circuit basics, and automation concepts.
